main.title: THE REDSTONE REGION
main.description: Several locations around Redstone demand investigation. Where will you travel?

swamp_church.label: Church in the Swamp
swamp_church.description: A fog-shrouded church deep in the marshlands where cult activity has been reported.

hill_ruins.label: Ruins on the Hill
hill_ruins.description: Ancient watchtower overlooking the valley, glowing with strange lights at night.

refugee_camp.label: Refugee Camp
refugee_camp.description: Makeshift settlement outside town where displaced miners seek shelter.

red_hollow_mine.label: Red Hollow Mine
red_hollow_mine.description: Abandoned mine shaft sealed by fearful workers, now home to unknown dangers.

return_to_town.label: Return to Redstone
return_to_town.description: Head back to town for rest and resupply.
